# Compiled class files
*.class

# Log files
*.log

# BlueJ files
*.ctxt

# Mobile Tools for Java (J2ME)
.mtj.tmp/

# Package Files #
*.jar
*.war
*.nar
*.ear
*.zip
*.tar.gz
*.rar

# virtual machine crash logs, see http://www.java.com/en/download/help/error_hotspot.xml
hs_err_pid*
replay_pid*

# IDE files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.iml
*.iws

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db

# Database credentials and sensitive files
config.properties
.env
.env.local
secrets.properties

# Temporary files
*.tmp
*.bak
*~

# Build directories
build/
target/
out/
dist/
